title: Thai-Style Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring lamb skewers with a robust and springy texture. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together curry paste, fish sauce, brown sugar, lime juice, and 2 tablespoons of oil.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb cubes, onion, and cilantro onto skewers.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
7. Transfer the skewers to a plate and serve with a dollop of yogurt and a sprinkle of cilantro.
8. Garnish with extra spring onions and serve immediately.
9. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
10. Enjoy your delicious Thai-style lamb skewers!
